title: Foundational Concepts of Metric Spaces
description: A visual flowchart illustrating the hierarchical relationship between core set theory concepts and their application in defining a metric space.
relationships: Set Theory provides the foundational language
A Metric Function is defined on a Set X x X
The pair (X, d) forms a Metric Space
The Metric d allows definition of Open/Closed Sets
Open/Closed Sets enable analysis of Convergence & Continuity
